Shop

Tested components and bench tools — sourced and verified by DST, available on Amazon. Prices are approximate and may vary. Amazon links are affiliate links.

diy components

Breadboard + Jumper Wire Kit

830-point solderless breadboard paired with a 140-piece male-to-male jumper wire set. Essential for rapid prototyping. Good contact retention, holds components without wiggle.

From ₹299 View on Amazon →
test equipment

Digital Multimeter — DT9205A

Auto-ranging digital multimeter covering AC/DC voltage, current, resistance, capacitance, diode, and transistor hFE. Decent accuracy for bench and field use. A solid staple for any kit.

From ₹850 View on Amazon →
test equipment

Pocket Oscilloscope — DSO138

Single-channel pocket oscilloscope with 200kHz analogue bandwidth. Available as a kit or pre-assembled. Useful for audio-range signal tracing and learning scope operation. Not a lab scope — but honest about what it is.

From ₹1,200 View on Amazon →

DhivanSTech

  • DhivanSTech

    DhivanSTech (DST) is an electronics brand supplying tested DIY maker components and test equipment via Amazon. We also document real builds, experiments, and engineering projects.
